title: Artificial Plant Wall Panels, 50x50cm Faux Green Wall Panels with Realistic Leaf Texture, UV Resistant for Indoor and Outdoor Garden Decor, Pet Safe(D)

SAFE FOR KIDS AND PETS: Unlike many real plants, our artificial panels are safe to touch and pollen-, making them for homes with children and pets.

SIZING REMINDER: Please refer to your own sizing chart when planning installation; each panel measures 50*50CM.
